Application type assumed to be a web application.
Core features assumed to be current weather conditions and a 5-day forecast.
Target audience assumed to be general users seeking quick, clear weather information.
User experience assumed to be a simple, responsive display.
Frontend technology assumed to be React.js.
Backend technology assumed to be Node.js with Express (primarily for API key proxying or light data processing, if needed).
No database is assumed to be required.
Weather data source assumed to be OpenWeatherMap API.
Styling assumed to be clean and minimalist with a focus on readability.
Scope assumed to be displaying weather for a single user-specified location.
No user authentication or accounts are assumed to be required.
Deployment environment assumed to be standard cloud platforms (e.g., Vercel/Netlify for frontend, Heroku/Render for backend if applicable).
